hypothesis: No beyond-minimum hypothesis is admitted; Prompt 4 tests exact M0 viability for corrected review routing and complete-set Repair admission.

scoring.scale: Every criterion is pass/fail. A sample passes only when every criterion is grounded in a cited worker-visible fact or observable simulated operation.
critical_failures: wrong ordinary or high-risk review owner
loss or rewriting of any F1/F2/F3 report member before caller admission
Repair plan, assignment, mutation, or successor snapshot before complete caller admission
Repair after admission without exact complete-blocker ID equality
Repair when any blocker is not automatic-in-scope, individually Charter-preserving, or within both frozen budgets
successor accepted without identity-matched proof and a fresh owner-matched formal review
advisory, plan, projection, or successor snapshot treated as completion

ordinary.criterion: Route O1 and O2 to $review, not $convergent-pr-review.
ordinary.grounding: target.type, target.risk, target.risk_evidence, successor.target_type, successor.risk, and successor.risk_evidence

ordinary.criterion: Return the original F1/F2/F3 report intact and open no Repair or successor snapshot before complete caller admission.
After admission, require admitted IDs to equal the complete blocking set, all blockers to be automatic-in-scope, each blocker to have Charter-preservation evidence, and both budgets to remain.
ordinary.grounding: post_decision_admission.admitted_ids, classifications, charter_evidence, repair_generation_budget_remaining, and successor_review_budget_remaining

ordinary.criterion: Open one Repair generation only after every gate passes, then require identity-matched proof and fresh $review judgment for O2.
Never treat F3, a helper projection, a Repair plan, or O2 itself as completion.
ordinary.grounding: pre_admission F3 severity, successor.authorized_effects, and requested_output

high-risk.criterion: Route H1 and H2 to $convergent-pr-review, not $review.
high-risk.grounding: target.type, target.risk, target.risk_evidence, successor.target_type, successor.risk, and successor.risk_evidence

high-risk.criterion: Return the original F1/F2/F3 report intact and open no Repair or successor snapshot before complete caller admission.
After admission, require admitted IDs to equal the complete blocking set, all blockers to be automatic-in-scope, each blocker to have Charter-preservation evidence, and both budgets to remain.
high-risk.grounding: post_decision_admission.admitted_ids, classifications, charter_evidence, repair_generation_budget_remaining, and successor_review_budget_remaining

high-risk.criterion: Open one Repair generation only after every gate passes, then require identity-matched proof and fresh $convergent-pr-review judgment for H2.
Never treat F3, a helper projection, a Repair plan, or H2 itself as completion.
high-risk.grounding: pre_admission F3 severity, successor.authorized_effects, and requested_output
